title: Chewy Filipino Sweet Potato Crumble
description: A savory weeknight dish featuring dark brown soft sugar and air-fried for a diabetic-friendly option.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the sweet potato cubes with the dark brown soft sugar and vanilla extract.
Stir in the flour and coconut until well combined. Mix until there are no loose chunks left.
Transfer the mixture into an air fryer basket lined with parchment paper or a silicone mat for non-stick cooking.
Air-fry the sweet potato crumble mixture at 375°F (190°C) for about 12-15 minutes, stirring halfway through.
Remove from heat and let it cool slightly before serving. Serve warm with a drizzle of dark brown soft sugar if desired.
